author: Ganesh Talluri, Laura Gomezjurado & Hiroki Naganuma
name: 11L + gated Krylov + AR GPTQ int6 + sliding-window eval + XSA + BigramHash
blurb: Non-record 16MB submission using the standard SentencePiece GPT path with Parallel Muon plus a small gated Krylov correction on square nonnormal slices. Uses AR self-generated Full-Hessian GPTQ int6, selective +/-1 pruning, and sliding-window evaluation. 26.99M params, 15,925,099-byte artifact, trained on 1xA100 80GB.
